'''ganusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sibiricoside|sibiricoside]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-n-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sibiricoside|sibiricoside]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ganusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gænisith|gænisith]] || [[word:gænisij|gænisij]] || [[word:gænisish|gænisish]] || [[word:gænisi|gænisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ganunusuth|ganunusuth]] || [[word:ganunusuj|ganunusuj]] || [[word:ganunusush|ganunusush]] || [[word:ganunusu|ganunusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ganusuth|ganusuth]] || [[word:ganusuj|ganusuj]] || [[word:ganusush|ganusush]] || [[word:ganusu|ganusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ganufsufth|ganufsufth]] || [[word:ganufsufj|ganufsufj]] || [[word:ganufsufsh|ganufsufsh]] || [[word:ganufsuf|ganufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ganusuthu|ganusuthu]] || [[word:ganusuju|ganusuju]] || [[word:ganusushu|ganusushu]] || [[word:ganusuku|ganusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ganusuth|ganusuth]] || [[word:ganusuj|ganusuj]] || [[word:ganusush|ganusush]] || [[word:ganusu|ganusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ganusuthul|ganusuthul]] || [[word:ganusujul|ganusujul]] || [[word:ganusushul|ganusushul]] || [[word:ganusukul|ganusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ganusuuthuthu|ganusuuthuthu]] || [[word:ganusuujuju|ganusuujuju]] || [[word:ganusuushushu|ganusuushushu]] || [[word:ganusuuku|ganusuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ganusuthun|ganusuthun]] || [[word:ganusujun|ganusujun]] || [[word:ganusushun|ganusushun]] || [[word:ganusukun|ganusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ganusuthuoro|ganusuthuoro]] || [[word:ganusujuoro|ganusujuoro]] || [[word:ganusushuoro|ganusushuoro]] || [[word:ganusukuoro|ganusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
